zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry FitzRandolf於大約1218年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth29歲，母親Alice de Stavelegh20歲。他於1240年與Alice de Thoresby在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1258年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: 英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry FitzRandolf于大约1218年出生在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth29岁，母亲Alice de Stavelegh20岁。他于1240年与Alice de Thoresby在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1258年之后在英国英格兰越可爾，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry FitzRandolf was born about 1218, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, was 29 and his mother, Alice de Stavelegh, was 20. He married Alice de Thoresby in 1240, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died after 1258, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry FitzRandolf est né environ 1218, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice de Stavelegh, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Thoresby en 1240, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé après 1258, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry FitzRandolf um 1218 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth 29 und seine Mutter Alice de Stavelegh 20. Er hat 1240 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England Alice de Thoresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb nach 1258 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzRandolf è nato il circa 1218 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Stavelegh, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Thoresby nel 1240, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1258, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry FitzRandolfが約1218年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworthは29歳，母Alice de Staveleghは20歳であった。1240年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでAlice de Thoresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1258年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry FitzRandolf(이)가 대략 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Stavelegh(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Alice de Thoresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1258년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzRandolf nasceu aproximadamente 1218, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Stavelegh, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Thoresby em 1240, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1258, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry FitzRandolf родился около 1218 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Stavelegh, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Thoresby в 1240 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер после 1258 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry FitzRandolf nació aproximadamente 1218, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice de Stavelegh, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice de Thoresby en 1240, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1258, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
